component.name: Mastodon MCP Server
component.summary: Model Context Protocol server for Mastodon integration

description.p: A comprehensive MCP server providing access to Mastodon social network functionality through the Model Context Protocol, enabling AI assistants and other MCP clients to interact with Mastodon instances.

ul.li: Timeline reading: home, local, public, hashtag
Status posting, deleting, favouriting, and reblogging
Account management: follow, block, mute, relationships
Full-text search for accounts, statuses, and hashtags

description.p: Replace fastmcp with bundled stdlib-only MCP implementation for broader distro compatibility.
